title: Path Scale PASS: 8-step Pell chain demonstrating rapid convergence to 3+2sqrt(2)
_fixture_purpose: Deep UNIFORM_B path (8 M_B steps from (2,1)) showing G ratio convergence to 3+2*sqrt(2) = 5.828427... by step 4, exact to 6 decimal places. G values are squares of Pell denominators: 5=1^2+2^2, 29=2^2+5^2, 169=5^2+12^2=13^2, 985=12^2+29^2, etc. Also includes a POLYNOMIAL path for contrast.

paths.convergence_note: Converges to 3+2*sqrt(2) = 5.828427124746190... by step 4 (6 decimal places). Growth factor per step: (1+sqrt(2))^2 = silver ratio squared.
Ratio -> 1 (polynomial growth ~2n^2). Contrast with EXPONENTIAL: after 5 steps G=85 vs G=33461 for UNIFORM_B.
Ratio -> 1 (polynomial growth). After 5 steps G=145 vs G=33461 for UNIFORM_B.

validation_checks.description: G values recomputed correctly (9 values for 8-step chain)
G monotone increasing in all 3 paths
8-step Pell chain final ratio within 0.0001 of 3+2sqrt(2)
